name: konfig.ts
description: Typesafe Kubernetes + ArgoCD configuration in TypeScript, powered by Effect.

scripts.build: bun run --cwd packages/core build && bun run --cwd packages/env build && bun run --cwd packages/k8s build && bun run --cwd packages/external-secrets build && bun run --cwd packages/sealed-secrets build && bun run --cwd packages/sops build && bun run --cwd packages/argocd build && bun run --cwd packages/docker build && bun run --cwd packages/cli build
scripts.check: bun run --cwd packages/core check && bun run --cwd packages/env check && bun run --cwd packages/k8s check && bun run --cwd packages/external-secrets check && bun run --cwd packages/sealed-secrets check && bun run --cwd packages/sops check && bun run --cwd packages/argocd check && bun run --cwd packages/docker check && bun run --cwd packages/cli check
scripts.test: bun run --cwd packages/core test && bun run --cwd packages/env test && bun run --cwd packages/k8s test && bun run --cwd packages/external-secrets test && bun run --cwd packages/sealed-secrets test && bun run --cwd packages/sops test && bun run --cwd packages/argocd test && bun run --cwd packages/docker test && bun run --cwd packages/cli test
